creator: novel@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

gnutls has been updated to 2.2.5 (see ports/123828).  WITHOUT_* knob 
haven't been added because I don't have enough time to test it now. 
Anyway, I'm closing this PR, because ports/121357 already contains a 
similar patch.  I will leave it open until I have more time to test and 
commit it. Thank you very much for your submission.
